sentences.full: Cola is bad for your health.
One can of cola contains a lot of sugar.
It is bad for your teeth and makes you fat.
sentences.cn: 這對你的牙齒不好，還會令你變胖。

sentences.full: You should drink six to eight glasses of water a day instead.
sentences.cn: 你應該每天喝六到八杯水。

sentences.full: We should eat at least two portions of vegetables and fruits per day to keep ourselves healthy.
sentences.cn: 我們每天應該至少吃兩份蔬菜和水果，這樣才能保持健康。

sentences.full: Grain products give us energy, so they are good for us.
sentences.cn: 穀物製品給我們提供能量，所以對我們有好處。

sentences.full: Fried food makes us fat, so it is bad for us.
sentences.cn: 炸食物會令我們變胖，所以對我們不好。

sentences.full: We need to eat enough grain products such as rice and bread.
sentences.cn: 我們需要吃足夠的穀物食品，例如米飯和麵包。
